title: Release Date January 23 2021 DELAYED
wikitext:
[]: Release Date: January 23, 2021 [DELAYED]             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Dec 26, 2019 8:08 pm Khara tweeted out the release date and the website updated! JUNE 27, 2020 is the Japanese release date for the final Evangelion film. 11 years to the day after the release of Evangelion 2.0. https://www.evangelion.co.jp/

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Dec 26, 2019 8:19 pm [HYPE INTENSIFIES] Still no subtitle yet. Maybe it'll be announced in an actual full trailer? (I've been considering what they've released so far to be teasers, and I don't know if I'm wrong for doing that.)

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Dec 26, 2019 8:31 pm Hoping for YOU CAN (NOT) RUN AWAY but they can literally go with ANYTHING.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 26, 2019 8:46 pm I was obviously secretly hoping it would be early june lol. Anyway, it takes the time it takes, and I'd rather the artists not be under crunch or at least as little as possible. June 27 is now a blessed day. Also, now I know the day I 'll have to start avoiding some things on the internet to not run across evil spoilers. If this follows 3.0, we could still get the bluray this year. If it's TOHO style we'll get it...someday. You can (not) give up. I'd like that one. You can (not) run away is basically the same though and fits so well for obvious reasons.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Dec 26, 2019 9:52 pm And in the end, it wasn't a deep coded message inside a Japanese game show in a small town channel. It was just a tweet. Let the theories about the amazing meaning behind 27-06-2020 begin. 184 days from now. 1st Child = Shinji. Unit 08 = Mari. 4th Child = Toji. Mari is a clone created from fusing the genetic material between Shinji and Toji. This is canon now.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Dec 26, 2019 10:01 pm Damn, it’s actually happening... 6 months from now! Feels unreal!

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Velorex » Thu Dec 26, 2019 10:12 pm 184 days away

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Dec 26, 2019 10:12 pm My body is ready.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by cyharding » Thu Dec 26, 2019 11:02 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Still no subtitle yet.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Dec 26, 2019 11:34 pm I love that on the news page of the official website we can see King is now an honorary member of Wille! He even has his own cute little scarf. As if we didn’t already know Anno is on the side of the environmental agency trying to save the planet from the infection man has inflicted on it!

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Dec 27, 2019 12:34 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: I love that on the news page of the official website we can see King is now an honorary member of Wille! He even has his own cute little scarf. As if we didn’t already know Anno is on the side of the environmental agency trying to save the planet from the infection man has inflicted on it!

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Mr. M » Fri Dec 27, 2019 3:10 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Khara tweeted out the release date and the website updated! JUNE 27, 2020 is the Japanese release date for the final Evangelion film. 11 years to the day after the release of Evangelion 2.0. https://www.evangelion.co.jp/

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Shun » Fri Dec 27, 2019 4:37 am In AVANT 1 the countdown indicating the time remaining for Wille's operation stops at 11 seconds and 3 cents, as shown in the image. These numbers conceal the secret of the movie's release date. Khara informed us that Shin Evangelion would be released in June 2020, that is exactly 11 months after July 6, 2019, thus reaching June 6, 2020. At this point I thought that 3 could indicate additional weeks, that is, 21 days after 6 June, thus achieving June 27, 2020.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Dec 27, 2019 4:43 am So... who's going to Japan for the movie?

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Mr. M » Fri Dec 27, 2019 5:36 am Joseki wrote: So... who's going to Japan for the movie?

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 27, 2019 5:54 am The husband and I are commencing plans now.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Dec 27, 2019 7:18 am Well, just 182 days to go.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Akko » Fri Dec 27, 2019 7:29 am Let the coundown start

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Fri Dec 27, 2019 8:11 am Just a few more months! I feel like the wait is going to be much worse than the one for 3.0.

[]: Re: Release Date: June 27, 2020             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Dec 27, 2019 10:08 am That Avant 1 easter egg actually works out haha, coincidence or not. No trailer it seems. I'm so desperate to see shots from this movie, it ain't even funny.
